title: Senior Software Engineer - Medlife Advisory Limited - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Medlife Advisory Limited - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Medlife Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Medlife Advisory Limited:
Medlife Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife Advisory Limited!
